rulings.Case Title: HUDSON RINCON CENTER, LLC, ET AL VS. DEEM SUM INTERNATIONAL, INC. ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Petition And Petition Of Defendant To Compel Arbitration And Dismiss Action
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, May 02, 2016, line 1. DEFENDANT DEEM SUM INTERNATIONAL, INC. D/B/A YANK SING's Petition Of Defendant To Compel Arbitration And Dismiss Action continued to May 18, 2016. Plaintiff is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide courtesy copy of the sur-reply to department 501 no later than May 6, 2016 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DUKE PARTNERS, LLC VS. ANA MACDONALD ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, May 02, 2016, line 3. DEFENDANT ANA MACDONALD's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend to allege the proper date for recovery of damages. Demurrer is otherwise overruled. This unlawful detainer is sufficiently alleged against the trustor and is not uncertain. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ROBERT PITTS HOUSING PARTNERS, L.P VS. VUNETTA SHANKLE-SADLER ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside And Vacate Default And Default Judgment And Recall Writ Of Possession
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, May 02, 2016, line 9. DEFENDANT VUNETTA SHANKLE-SADLER's Motion To Set Aside And Vacate Default And Default Judgment And Recall Writ Of Possession GRANTED, subject to (1) Defendant providing proof of service for the motion and the OST; (2) opposition; (3) Defendant posting $2,394 with the Court no later than May 3, 2016; and (4) Defendant filing answer no later than May 3, 2016. = (501/REQ)
